description_long: This apartment building is a large, multi-story residential structure with a symmetrical layout and a central entrance flanked by landscaped greenery. The building features a light-colored facade, multiple rows of evenly spaced windows, and a prominent driveway leading to a garage area. A swimming pool is visible at the rear, surrounded by paved walkways and additional green spaces with trees and shrubs. The roof is pitched and segmented, with several gabled sections and dormer windows, giving the building a suburban, upscale appearance. There are outdoor seating areas and a detached structure, possibly a guest house or utility building, connected by a covered walkway. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on comfort and community amenities.
description: A large, modern apartment building with a pitched roof, central entrance, landscaped grounds, and a rear swimming pool. The facade is light-colored with symmetrical windows and a prominent driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical facade, driveway, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, detached structure, and tree-lined pathways.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, outdoor seating area, and rows of windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, covered walkway, and additional green spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows across the facade, evenly spaced and aligned both vertically and horizontally, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
